nasb.text: Then she went in and fell at his feet and bowed herself to the ground, and she took up her son and went out.

esv.text: She came and fell at his feet, bowing to the ground. Then she picked up her son and went out.

cnv.text: 於是她進去，在他的腳前下拜，俯伏在地上；然後把兒子抱起來，出去了。

ccb.text: 妇人进来，在以利沙脚前下拜，然后抱起儿子出去了。
